200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Each shot has a 20% chance of enhancing damage done by a nearby ally by 30% for 2,5 sec. Up to 2 effects.

description 4/6

Each shot has a 20% chance of enhancing damage done by a nearby ally by 50% for 2,5 sec. Up to 3 effects. Once in a while, fires lead shot at a nearby enemy. The shot deals physical damage and silences that enemy for 1 sec. While silenced, he cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). An enemy that is closer takes greater damage and vice versa. Max damage is 120000, and min damage is 39600.

description 6/6

Each shot has a 30% chance of enhancing damage done by a nearby ally by 80% for 3,5 sec. Up to 3 effects. Once in a while, fires lead shot at a nearby enemy. The shot hits all enemies within a small radius around the target, dealing physical damage and silencing all enemies hit for 2 sec. While silenced, he cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). An enemy that is closer takes greater damage and vice versa. Max damage is 300000, and min damage is 99000. All allies within a small radius around the Mercenary have their Piercing iuncreased by 25%. Lasts for 5 sec. Also, all units restore 120000 health for 3 sec. During that period, the Mercenary’s crit is increased by 50% and the enemy with the lowest health becomes his preferred target. Also each time the Mercenary fires a shot, he takes an extra shot at a random enemy.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, increases the damage of 2 other allies with the greatest damage by 30% for 2,5 sec.

description 4/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, increases the damage of 2 other allies with the greatest damage by 50% for 2,5 sec. The damage from the lead shot is also dealt to all units in the small area around the target.

description 6/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, increases the damage of 2 other allies with the greatest damage by 80% for 2,5 sec. The damage from the lead shot is also dealt to all units in the small area around the target. In addition to the increasing crit, Mercenary’s damage increases by 50% for 3 sec. Mercenary’s attacks also ignore 25% armor.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, increases the fortitude of the nearest ally by 20% for 2,5 sec.

description 4/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, increases the fortitude of the nearest ally by 20% for 2,5 sec. The lead shot restores Mercenary’s health depending on the distance to the target. Max value : 100000 of Marcenary’s max health; min value : 33000.

description 6/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, increases the fortitude of the nearest ally by 20% for 2,5 sec. The lead shot restores Mercenary’s health depending on the distance to the target. Max value : 100000 of Marcenary’s max health; min value : 33000. In addition to increasing the max health of allies, Mercenary also increases their own max health by 25% for 5 sec and restores 120000 health for 3 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, incrases the crit of that ally for 4 sec.

description 4/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, incrases the crit of that ally for 4 sec. The lead shot silences all enemies in the small area around the target for 1 sec. During that time, they cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped).

description 6/6

Mercenary’s shot, in addition to increasing damage, incrases the crit of that ally for 4 sec. The lead shot silences all enemies in the small area around the target for 1 sec. During that time, they cannot use any abilities (except those granted by the set equipped). In addition to the increasing crit, Mercenary’s physical and magic armor increases by 125% for 3 sec.
